description: Whole-passage insertions (e.g. material dropped from Vilna pagination) go here as JSON files. Sefaria gemara already embeds several restorations (Sanhedrin 43a, Gittin 57a, Sanhedrin 67a). Add witness-specific insertions with daf, anchor, lines, and sources.

examples.notes: Lines 39-51 on Sefaria include the Munich baraita about Yeshu ha-Notzri.
